---
title: "test_edda_syntax_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_edda_syntax_empire.py"
loc: 20
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.85
style_score: 3.87
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.72
---

## Intent
The `test_edda_syntax_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_edda_syntax_conversion, test_edda_syntax_multiline. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_edda_syntax_conversion, test_edda_syntax_multiline. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.edda](file://src.core.edda)

### Exports
- `test_edda_syntax_conversion`
- `test_edda_syntax_multiline`
